# Hover Card

Shows a supplementary preview for the content behind a link or trigger.

## Installation

Add the Hover Card component from the configured StackTrace registry.

```shell
npx shadcn-vue@latest add @stacktrace/hover-card
```

## Usage

Use Hover Card to preview supplementary information behind a familiar link, such as a profile or referenced resource. The trigger and its destination must make sense without the preview; hover content is an enhancement, not the only source of essential information or actions.

```vue
<template>
  <HoverCard>
    <HoverCardTrigger as-child>
      <Button variant="link">@stacktrace</Button>
    </HoverCardTrigger>
    <HoverCardContent class="w-80">
      <div class="flex gap-4">
        <Avatar>
          <AvatarFallback>ST</AvatarFallback>
        </Avatar>
        <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
          <h4 class="text-sm font-semibold">StackTrace UI</h4>
          <p class="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Laravel-focused Vue components distributed as source.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </HoverCardContent>
  </HoverCard>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Avatar, AvatarFallback } from '@/Components/Avatar'
import { Button } from '@/Components/Button'
import { HoverCard, HoverCardContent, HoverCardTrigger } from '@/Components/HoverCard'
</script>
```

## Interaction and delays

The card opens from pointer hover or keyboard focus and remains available while the pointer moves into its content. Use `open-delay` and `close-delay` only when the defaults feel unsuitable in repeated use; extremely short delays cause accidental popups. Touch interaction is ignored by default and can be enabled explicitly with `enable-touch`, but important content should still have a direct destination on touch devices.

## Controlled state and positioning

Bind `v-model:open` only when another interface element needs to observe or control the preview. `HoverCardContent` forwards positioning props such as `side`, `align`, and collision behavior, with a local default `side-offset` of four pixels.

## Composition

Use `HoverCardTrigger as-child` around the original link or control to avoid a wrapper. The child must forward attributes and events as described in the [composition fundamentals](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/fundamentals/composition).

> **Use Popover for interactive content: [Popover](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/components/popover)**
>
> Popover opens deliberately and is the better choice for controls, forms, or information that the user must be able to reach reliably.

Hosted documentation: [Hover Card](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/components/hover-card)
